stream_worker.note: 8 new errors in TEST-ONLY files (dev-secret.integration.test.ts cross-rootDir LocalSecretsManager import + WorkerLocalSecretsManager cast; connector-lifecycle-fixtures.ts RequestInfo+Response.bytes type mismatch). Not in product code. Vitest passes via esbuild transpilation. Developer report falsely claimed zero new errors beyond the 3 pre-existing. Classified LOW/deferred per rubric (no correctness/safety/data-loss impact; test files only).

non_inert_spot_checks.red_evidence: 2 tests FAILED: 'first request URL contains since_id=0' (received since_id=null) + 'first fetch carries since_id parameter' (expected '0', received 'null')

non_inert_spot_checks.revert: PgConnectorInstanceRepository.save() ON CONFLICT clause removed (plain INSERT)
non_inert_spot_checks.red_evidence: 1 test FAILED: 'second save() for same (brand_id, provider) returns the SAME row id — no 23505 throw' → error: duplicate key value violates unique constraint 'connector_instance_brand_provider_unique'

1 Playwright test FAILED: 'disconnected connector_instance renders as Connect tile (not health badge)' → Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed — getByTestId('input-shop-shopify') element not found (tile rendered Connected state instead of Connect)

it_skip_legitimacy.describe: A4-3: WorkerLocalSecretsManager prod-hard-fail — ADR-R3 discovered gap
it_skip_legitimacy.reason: WorkerLocalSecretsManager (worker-secrets.ts:69) genuinely lacks a NODE_ENV=production constructor guard. The assertion WOULD be RED on current master. Per D-9 (tests-only, no product changes), the fix is deferred to a separate PR. The it.skip includes the complete ready-to-use assertion, the exact fix code, and a reference to ADR-R3. This is correctly documented as a DISCOVERED PRODUCT GAP, not a hidden failing test.

data_safety.check: SELECT count(*) FROM realized_revenue_ledger WHERE brand_id::text LIKE '60d543dc%' → 19476 (within expected ~19.5k range; unchanged)
data_safety.grep_check: All 7 occurrences of '60d543dc' in new test files are 'NEVER 60d543dc-*' comment guards — 0 SQL/seed references to the live brand

git_status_note: Product code clean. Only .engineering-os/ (pipeline state) files are modified — expected pipeline state, not test reverts. All 3 spot-check reverts fully restored before this verdict.

negative_control.protection: RLS (FORCE RLS on connector_instance) + brain_app NOBYPASSRLS
negative_control.command: A2-3: brand B GUC reads brand A connector_instance under brain_app
negative_control.captured_red_output: brand_B GUC → count=0 (RLS blocks; REVERT-RED: if DROP FORCE RLS → count>0 → assertion fails)
negative_control.also: A2-2: empty-string GUC → pgErrorCode '22P02' (proves NIL-uuid fix is load-bearing)

negative_control.command: A3-2: INSERT realized_revenue_ledger with INR into AED brand
negative_control.captured_red_output: Error P0001: RAISE EXCEPTION 'currency mismatch' (trigger fires)

findings.title: stream-worker adds 8 new tsc errors in test-only files (false developer report claim)
findings.detail: Developer report stated 'stream-worker has 3 PRE-EXISTING tsc errors (confirm this branch adds none beyond those).' The branch adds 8 new tsc errors in test files: dev-secret.integration.test.ts (cross-rootDir LocalSecretsManager import: TS6059+TS6307 x2; WorkerLocalSecretsManager cast: TS2352) and connector-lifecycle-fixtures.ts (RequestInfo: TS2552; Response.bytes: TS2741 x2). All in test/fixture files only. No product code affected. Vitest runs pass (esbuild bypasses tsc). Classified LOW/deferred per rubric.
findings.defer_condition: Fix tsconfig.json to allow cross-rootDir test imports OR use dynamic import with explicit type annotations in next cleanup PR
